spec.description: AzureASOManagedControlPlaneSpec defines the desired state of AzureASOManagedControlPlane.

resources.description: Resources are embedded ASO resources to be managed by this resource.

version.description:
Version is the Kubernetes version of the control plane. It fulfills Cluster API's control plane
provider contract.

status.description: AzureASOManagedControlPlaneStatus defines the observed state of AzureASOManagedControlPlane.

controlPlaneEndpoint.description: ControlPlaneEndpoint represents the endpoint for the cluster's API server.

host.description: host is the hostname on which the API server is serving.

port.description: port is the port on which the API server is serving.

initialized.description:
Initialized represents whether or not the API server has been provisioned. It fulfills Cluster API's
control plane provider contract. For AKS, this is equivalent to `ready`.

ready.description:
Ready represents whether or not the API server is ready to receive requests. It fulfills Cluster API's
control plane provider contract. For AKS, this is equivalent to `initialized`.

resource.description: StatusResource is a handle to a resource.

version.description:
Version is the observed Kubernetes version of the control plane. It fulfills Cluster API's control
plane provider contract.

exampleYAML:
apiVersion: infrastructure.cluster.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1
kind: AzureASOManagedControlPlane
metadata:
  name: example-azureasomanagedcontrolplane
  namespace: default
spec:
  resources: []
  version: "example-version"
